name: George's Deep Dish
teaser: The newest on this list and the new king of thick. A sourdough amalgamation of the best Chicago Deep Dish styles.
review: The newest on this list and the new king of thick. A sourdough amalgamation of the best of the different Chicago Deep Dish styles in one delightful package.
headsUp: The sourdough base is a genuine innovation. Deep dish for bread lovers.
update: Newest and arguably most exciting deep dish in the city right now.
